payload.value: Local ticket events are not syncing to a hosted remote because this checkout has no effective remote target: scope remote show reports url/project null, no .scope/remote.json exists, SCOPE_REMOTE/SCOPE_PROJECT/SCOPE_API_KEY/SCOPE_TOKEN are unset, scope sync exits with remote hub URL required, and local /api/meta reports remote:null and remoteLink:null. Expected: remote-bound workspaces clearly run push/pull so local ticket events reach the hosted project and then the mobile app.
